title: Admin Entity List Filter Bar & Default Filters Indicator

tasks.title: Create filter-types.ts with core type definitions
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/filter-types.ts` with:
- `FilterControlType` = 'select' | 'boolean'
- `FilterControlConfig` type with paramKey, labelKey, type, options?, allLabelKey?, defaultValue?, order?
- `FilterBarConfig` type with filters array
- `ActiveFilters` type (Record<string, string>)
- `FilterChipData` type with paramKey, labelKey, value, displayValue, isDefault

All types must be readonly. Use `export type` for all exports. Follow spec section 5.1 and 5.3 exactly.

Test: typecheck passes (`pnpm typecheck --filter admin`)

tasks.title: Add filterBarConfig property to EntityConfig in types.ts
tasks.description:
Modify `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/types.ts`:
- Import `FilterBarConfig` from `./filters/filter-types`
- Add `readonly filterBarConfig?: FilterBarConfig` to `EntityConfig<TData>` type
- Keep existing `defaultFilters` property (backward compat)
- Add JSDoc explaining precedence: filterBarConfig > defaultFilters

Test: typecheck passes. Existing entity configs still compile without filterBarConfig.

tasks.title: Create filter-utils.ts with extractActiveFilters and computeDefaultFilters
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/filter-utils.ts` with:
- `FILTER_CLEARED_SENTINEL = '__cleared__'` constant
- `extractActiveFilters({ searchParams, filterBarConfig })` - implements three-state semantics (spec section 6.10)
- `computeDefaultFilters({ filterBarConfig })` - extracts only filters with defaultValue
- `filtersEqual(a, b)` - deep equality check for ActiveFilters

All functions use RO-RO pattern. Follow spec section 6.10 algorithms exactly.

Test: Unit tests in next task.

tasks.title: Add buildFilterChips and buildFilterParamUpdate to filter-utils.ts
tasks.description:
Add to `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/filter-utils.ts`:
- `buildFilterChips({ activeFilters, filterBarConfig, defaultFilters, t })` - builds FilterChipData[] sorted by order (spec section 6.10 algorithm)
- `buildFilterParamUpdate({ paramKey, value, hasDefault })` - returns param update object with sentinel logic

Algorithm for buildFilterChips:
1. For each activeFilter entry, find matching config by paramKey
2. Resolve displayValue based on type (select -> option labelKey, boolean -> Yes/No)
3. Determine isDefault by comparing to defaultFilters
4. Sort by config.order ascending

Test: Unit tests in next task.

subtasks.title: Implement buildFilterChips with sort by order

tasks.title: Write unit tests for filter-utils.ts
Create useFilterState hook
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/useFilterState.ts`:
- Accepts { filterBarConfig, searchParams, onUpdateSearch }
- Returns { activeFilters, computedDefaults, hasActiveFilters, hasNonDefaultFilters, chips, handleFilterChange, handleClearAll, handleResetDefaults }
- Uses useTranslations() internally for t function
- Memoization strategy per spec section 6.9:
  - computedDefaults: useMemo([filterBarConfig])
  - activeFilters: useMemo([searchParams, filterBarConfig, computedDefaults])
  - chips: useMemo([activeFilters, filterBarConfig, computedDefaults, t])
  - hasNonDefaultFilters: useMemo([activeFilters, computedDefaults])
  - handlers: useCallback([filterBarConfig, computedDefaults, onUpdateSearch])
- handleFilterChange ALWAYS resets page to 1
- handleClearAll sets sentinel for defaults, removes non-defaults
- handleResetDefaults restores config defaultValues

Uses extractActiveFilters, computeDefaultFilters, buildFilterChips, buildFilterParamUpdate from filter-utils.ts.

Test: Unit tests in next task.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for useFilterState hook
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/__tests__/useFilterState.test.ts` using renderHook from @testing-library/react.

Tests from spec section 13.2:
- Returns defaults when no URL filters
- Returns URL filters when present
- Returns empty when all defaults cleared (sentinel)
- handleFilterChange adds filter -> onUpdateSearch called with page: 1
- handleFilterChange removes filter -> onUpdateSearch called without that key
- handleClearAll clears everything -> sentinel for defaults, undefined for non-defaults, page: 1
- handleResetDefaults restores defaults -> onUpdateSearch with default values, page: 1
- hasActiveFilters true when filters exist
- hasActiveFilters false when empty
- hasNonDefaultFilters true when user changed from defaults
- hasNonDefaultFilters false when at defaults

Mock useTranslations hook. Target: >= 90% coverage.

subtasks.title: Set up renderHook with mocked useTranslations

tasks.title: Create FilterChip component
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/FilterChip.tsx`:
- Props: { chip: FilterChipData, onRemove: () => void }
- Uses existing Badge component from `@/components/ui-wrapped/Badge`
- Default-origin: variant='secondary' with '(default)' text from t('admin-filters.defaultBadge')
- User-applied: variant='outline' without default text
- X button using CloseIcon from @repo/icons (14px)
- Accessibility: role='status' on container, aria-label='Remove filter: {label} {value}' on X, tabIndex={0}, onKeyDown Enter/Space

Test: Component tests in T-024.

tasks.title: Create ActiveFilterChips component
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/ActiveFilterChips.tsx`:
- Props: { chips: readonly FilterChipData[], onRemove: (paramKey: string) => void }
- Renders horizontal row of FilterChip components
- Container: flex flex-wrap items-center gap-1.5
- aria-live='polite' and role='status' on container
- Focus management: after removing a chip, focus next chip or 'Clear all' button

Test: Component tests in T-024.

subtasks.title: Implement focus management on chip removal

tasks.title: Create FilterSelect component
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/FilterSelect.tsx`:
- Props: { config: FilterControlConfig, value: string | undefined, onChange: (value: string | undefined) => void }
- Composes over existing shadcn Select from `@/components/ui/select.tsx`
- Trigger shows translated label when no value, translated selected value when active
- First option is 'All' using allLabelKey or fallback 'admin-filters.allOption'
- 'All' selection calls onChange(undefined)
- Trigger styling: h-8 border-dashed (compact). When active: border-solid border-primary
- Size: h-8 text-sm matching DataTableToolbar

Test: Component tests in T-023.

subtasks.title: Add conditional trigger styling for active state

tasks.title: Create FilterBoolean component
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/FilterBoolean.tsx`:
- Props: { config: FilterControlConfig, value: string | undefined, onChange: (value: string | undefined) => void }
- Composes over existing shadcn Select (same pattern as FilterSelect)
- Three fixed options: 'All' -> onChange(undefined), 'Yes' -> onChange('true'), 'No' -> onChange('false')
- i18n keys: admin-filters.booleanYes, admin-filters.booleanNo, admin-filters.allOption
- Same trigger styling as FilterSelect (h-8 border-dashed, active: border-solid border-primary)

Test: Component tests in T-023.

tasks.title: Create FilterActions component
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/FilterActions.tsx`:
- Props: { hasActiveFilters, hasNonDefaultFilters, onClearAll, onResetDefaults }
- 'Clear all' button: variant='ghost', size='sm', CloseIcon from @repo/icons. Visible when hasActiveFilters
- 'Reset to defaults' button: variant='ghost', size='sm', RotateCcwIcon from @repo/icons. Visible when hasNonDefaultFilters
- i18n keys: admin-filters.clearAll, admin-filters.resetDefaults
- Both buttons use translated text

Test: Component tests in T-024.

subtasks.title: Create component with conditional button rendering

tasks.title: Create FilterBar container component
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/FilterBar.tsx`:
- Props: FilterBarProps per spec section 6.3
- Renders FilterControls section: one control per config.filters entry (sorted by order)
- Only renders select and boolean types. Silently skips unknown types.
- Below controls: ActiveFilterChips when hasActiveFilters
- FilterActions with conditional buttons
- Layout: Controls row (flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2), Chips row (flex flex-wrap items-center gap-1.5 pt-2)
- Wrapped in div with subtle border-bottom and padding
- Mobile: flex-wrap handles responsive layout

Test: Component tests in T-024.

subtasks.title: Render filter controls sorted by order
Route select/boolean types to correct components

tasks.title: Create filters/index.ts barrel exports
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/index.ts`:
- Export FilterBar component
- Export useFilterState hook
- Export all types from filter-types.ts (FilterControlConfig, FilterBarConfig, ActiveFilters, FilterChipData)
- Export FILTER_CLEARED_SENTINEL from filter-utils.ts
- Use named exports only (no default exports)

Also update `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/index.ts` to re-export filter types if needed.

Test: typecheck passes.

tasks.title: Refactor createEntityApi to RO-RO pattern with filterBarConfig support
tasks.description:
Modify `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/api/createEntityApi.ts`:
- Change signature from positional args to RO-RO: createEntityApi({ endpoint, itemSchema, defaultFilters, filterBarConfig })
- Add CreateEntityApiParams<TData> type
- Update filter logic per spec section 7.3:
  - When filterBarConfig present: use only filters from useFilterState (ignore defaultFilters)
  - When filterBarConfig absent: legacy path (apply defaultFilters then filters)
- Sentinel value '__cleared__' is NEVER sent to API (only actual values)
- Update the single call site in EntityListPage.tsx to use new signature

Test: typecheck passes. Existing behavior preserved for entities without filterBarConfig.

tasks.title: Integrate FilterBar into EntityListPage
tasks.description:
Modify `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/EntityListPage.tsx`:
1. Update validateSearch: destructure known params, spread remaining as filterParams (spec section 7.1)
2. Import and call useFilterState({ filterBarConfig: config.filterBarConfig, searchParams: search, onUpdateSearch: updateSearch })
3. Pass filterState.activeFilters to queryParams.filters
4. Render FilterBar between DataTableToolbar and DataTable/GridView (spec section 7.2 JSX)
5. Only render FilterBar when config.filterBarConfig is defined
6. Pass all filterState props to FilterBar component
7. Add 'no results with filters' message when hasActiveFilters && empty results using t('admin-filters.noResults')

Test: typecheck passes. Integration tests in T-025.

subtasks.title: Update validateSearch to pass through filter params

tasks.title: Create i18n admin-filters translation files and register namespace
tasks.description:
Create 3 new JSON files and register the namespace:
1. `packages/i18n/src/locales/en/admin-filters.json` - English translations (spec section 9.1)
2. `packages/i18n/src/locales/es/admin-filters.json` - Spanish translations (spec section 9.1)
3. `packages/i18n/src/locales/pt/admin-filters.json` - Portuguese translations (spec section 9.1)
4. Update `packages/i18n/src/config.ts`:
   - Add 'admin-filters' to namespaces array
   - Add static imports for all 3 locale files
   - Add to rawTranslations object for es, en, pt
5. Run `pnpm generate-types` to regenerate TranslationKey union type

Keys include: allOption, booleanYes, booleanNo, defaultBadge, clearAll, resetDefaults, activeFilters, noResults, status.*, destinationType.*, accommodationType.*, eventCategory.*, postCategory.*, role.*, isFeatured.*, isNews.*, includeDeleted.*

Test: typecheck passes after generate-types. All keys accessible via t().

tasks.title: Write component tests for FilterSelect and FilterBoolean
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/__tests__/FilterSelect.test.tsx` and `FilterBoolean.test.tsx`.

FilterSelect tests (spec section 13.4):
- Shows label when no value selected
- Shows selected translated value when active
- 'All' option clears filter (onChange(undefined))
- Selecting value sets filter (onChange('DRAFT'))
- All options from config rendered (N + 'All' = N+1 items)

FilterBoolean tests (spec section 13.5):
- Shows label when no value
- Shows 'Yes' when value='true'
- Shows 'No' when value='false'
- 'All' clears (onChange(undefined))
- 'Yes' sets true (onChange('true'))
- 'No' sets false (onChange('false'))

Mock useTranslations. Use @testing-library/react for rendering.

tasks.title: Write component tests for FilterBar, FilterChip, FilterActions, ActiveFilterChips
tasks.description:
Create test files:
- `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/__tests__/FilterBar.test.tsx`
- `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/__tests__/FilterChip.test.tsx`

FilterBar tests (spec section 13.3):
- Renders select filters from config (2 Select triggers)
- Renders boolean filters (1 Select with Yes/No/All)
- Skips unknown filter types (no crash)
- Shows chips when filters active
- Chip shows '(default)' badge for default-origin
- 'Clear all' visible when hasActiveFilters
- 'Clear all' hidden when no filters
- 'Reset to defaults' visible when hasNonDefaultFilters
- Sort order respected

FilterChip tests:
- Renders label and value
- Shows '(default)' badge when isDefault
- Click X calls onRemove
- Keyboard Enter/Space on X calls onRemove
- Has correct aria-label

Mock useTranslations. Use @testing-library/react.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for EntityListPage with FilterBar (12 tests)
tasks.description:
Create `apps/admin/src/components/entity-list/filters/__tests__/integration.test.tsx`.

Tests from spec section 13.6:
- FilterBar renders when config has filterBarConfig
- FilterBar absent when no filterBarConfig
- Selecting filter updates URL (status=ACTIVE as individual param)
- URL filter state restores on mount (?status=ACTIVE -> select shows Active, chip visible)
- Filter change resets page to 1 (on page 3, change filter -> page=1)
- Default filters applied on first visit (destinations: destinationType=CITY chip with '(default)')
- Clear default filter sends unfiltered request (no destinationType param)
- Legacy entities unaffected (only defaultFilters, no filterBarConfig -> no FilterBar, defaults still silently applied)

Accessibility tests (spec section 13.7):
- All filter controls reachable via Tab
- Chip removal via keyboard (Enter on X)
- aria-live container present
- X button has descriptive aria-label

Use @testing-library/react with TanStack Router test utilities.
